name: Tuna Sauce
recipeIngredient: 7 ounces Italian tuna packed in oil
1/4 cup white wine, salt and pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter and tuna oil in a pan.
2. Sautee the garlic for 2 minutes until golden.
3. Add the tuna and cook for 5 minutes.
4. Add the tomatoes, white wine, parsley, salt, and pepper to taste.
5. Cook on low heat for 30 minutes.
6. Serve over cooked, drained pasta.
